overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character with red hair walking through a futuristic urban environment during golden hour. The character travels from a busy city street with neon storefronts, under a pedestrian overpass with street vendors, and along a waterfront promenade lined with palm trees overlooking the distant skyline.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic urban street with neon storefronts and holographic billboards

events.description: futuristic vehicles pass by on the multi-lane road to the left
character approaches the pedestrian overpass structure ahead

agents.ego_description: character with red hair walking steadily along the sidewalk, passing futuristic storefronts with neon signage on the right

notable_agents.action: futuristic sedan driving along the multi-lane road

entered.detail: tall futuristic buildings with reflective glass facades lining the street
large glowing advertisements and corporate signage mounted on buildings
busy street with multiple lanes of futuristic vehicle traffic
commercial establishments with neon lighting and holographic displays
elevated concrete walkway crossing over the street ahead

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a futuristic urban street during golden hour, with the character walking along a concrete sidewalk. Glass office towers and neon holographic billboards line the left side while futuristic storefronts glow on the right. The character approaches a pedestrian overpass structure in the distance as moderate traffic flows along the multi-lane road.

scene_state.functional_zone: area beneath elevated pedestrian walkway with street vendors

events.description: character enters the covered area beneath the pedestrian overpass
lighting shifts to shadow as character moves deeper under the overpass structure
character exits the covered area and emerges back into sunlight

agents.ego_description: walking under the concrete overpass, passing street vendors and trash bags on the right side

notable_agents.action: pedestrian with blonde hair walking ahead under the overpass

entered.detail: massive concrete pedestrian bridge overhead with angular support beams
thick concrete columns supporting the elevated walkway
small wooden kiosk with glowing advertisements selling goods
piles of garbage bags accumulated near the vendor stall

segments.scene_description: The character enters the shadow of a massive concrete pedestrian overpass, transitioning from open street to a semi-covered environment. Support pillars line the left side while a street vendor stall and trash bags occupy the right. The lighting shifts to mixed shadows as the character passes underneath the structure, walking alongside another pedestrian, before emerging back into sunlight with the distant skyline becoming visible.

scene_state.functional_zone: waterfront promenade with palm trees overlooking distant city skyline

events.description: water becomes visible on the right as the path opens to waterfront
scene opens up to reveal expansive water view and distant skyscrapers with construction cranes

agents.ego_description: walking along the waterfront promenade with palm trees, enjoying the view of the distant skyline and water

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in tan coat walking alongside parked cars

entered.detail: calm body of water reflecting the golden hour sunlight
low concrete wall separating the sidewalk from the water
tall palm trees lining the edge of the waterfront path
futuristic skyscrapers and high-rise buildings across the water with construction cranes
line of futuristic cars parked along the street curb

segments.scene_description: The character emerges onto a scenic waterfront promenade with palm trees lining the right side and a calm body of water reflecting the golden sunlight. Parked futuristic vehicles line the left side of the path while the distant city skyline with towering skyscrapers and construction cranes dominates the horizon across the water. The open layout provides full sky visibility and a expansive view of the futuristic cityscape.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a dense futuristic city that gradually opens into an expansive waterfront vista during golden hour. It begins on a concrete urban street lined with glass office towers and glowing holographic billboards, moving steadily toward a massive pedestrian overpass. As the character enters the shadow of the overpass, the environment shifts from open sunlight to a semi-covered space filled with support pillars and street vendor stalls before emerging once more into the light. The scene then expands onto a scenic promenade where palm trees and parked futuristic vehicles frame a calm body of water. Finally, the view opens completely to reveal a distant skyline of towering skyscrapers and construction cranes reflecting the warm golden sunlight.
